attacking_style: Breakaway specialist who targets strategic positioning rather than solo attacks. Demonstrates tactical patience, waiting for favorable conditions and specific opportunities (KOM points, stage wins from breakaway groups).
team_tactics: Limited team support evident; operates as opportunist in breakaways rather than protected leader. Self-sufficient rider who relies on personal positioning and tactical awareness over domestique-led setups.
terrain_preference: Adaptable to varied terrain when in breakaways. Shows technical proficiency in adverse conditions (wet roads). KOM-focused suggests comfort on rolling to moderate climbs but not steep mountain finishes.
vulnerability: Struggles to make or survive selections when high intensity climbing is required. Dropped before decisive phases when form is lacking, indicating limited ability to respond to repeated accelerations on climbs.
key_patterns: Targets KOM classifications through calculated breakaway placement rather than pure climbing strength (2 observations)
Excels in wet/technical conditions with superior bike handling and tactical adaptation (3 observations)
Operates primarily from breakaways; not competitive in bunch sprints or elite GC selections (2 observations)
Demonstrates tactical intelligence over raw power: seated sprint for traction, strategic KOM hunting (3 observations)
form_trajectory: neutral: Most recent 2020 observation shows positive tactical execution (KOM hunting), but limited 2020 data. Earlier 2019 showed both success (Vuelta win) and weakness (Dauphiné dropped).
